MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINFORD, INC. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-08-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 07 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-14-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. DEFENDANT, JEAN TOY AGREES TO PAY DECEMBER RENT OF 429.59 IN TWO PAYMENTS OF $214.76. THE FIRST PAYMENT SHALL BE DUE 12-12-94. THE SECOND PAYMENT IS DUE AND PAYABLE 12-19-94. THE PAYMENTS MAY BE MADE TO THE MANAGER OF MS. TOY'S RESIDENCE AT 427 STOCKTON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, ROOM 200. REMAINING RENT AND DAMAGES, COURT COSTS AND ATTY FEES EQUAL $1,387.48. DEFENDANT JEAN TOY AGREES TO MAKE PAYMENTS OVER A SIX MONTH PERIOD COVERING THIS AMOUNT. BEGINNING 1-15-95, MS. TOY WILL MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $231.95. THESE PAYMENTS WILL BE MADE ON THE FIFTEENTH OF EACH MONTH THROUGH 6-15-95. THESE PAYMENTS WILL BE IN ADDITION TO MS. TOY'S MONTHLY RENT. AFTER MS. TOY'S FINAL PAYMENT ON $1,387.48, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. IF PAYMENTS AND OR RENT ARE NOT MAINTAINED BY MS. TOY, PLAINTIFF SHALL SEEK RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES AND ANY UNPAID BALENCES THROUGH EX PARTE MOTION.
